title: バーガー・イン・ジャパン！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The Big Carrot Burger has come to Japan!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer! Fancy goin' for a burger with me?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They've brought over one of my favorite burgers
from back home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's outta this world! First, there's the giant patty,
practically overflowin' with juices...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Then comes the sweet, buttery carrot sauce on
top! I used to buy 'em with my family all the
time...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why we gotta go together, Trainer. 'Cause
you're my Japanese family!
choice_data_list: You know we've got training soon, right?
You know we've got training soon, right?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why we gotta go! Munchin' on that
burger will give me the strength to work hard!
Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yesss! All right, then—we'd better scoot!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much, Trainer! Don't hold back, now!
Eat your fill!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And afterward, let's give training our all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I can't believe they're closed today...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I swear I looked it up and everything... Boo.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We can get the burgers to go? I didn't know that
was an option!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This way, we can avoid usin' up too much training
time. Everything works out!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're just as smart as a whip, Trainer. I tip my
hat to ya!
